steps.title: Use the overlook clue
steps.content: The second sentence says scholars may inadvertently overlook nuances by focusing on obvious movement traits. The blank must mean to disregard or treat subtleties as unimportant.

steps.title: Choose the matching verb
steps.content: Choice A means disregard or treat as unimportant. Choice B means examine closely, the opposite idea. Choice C means enlarge or amplify. Choice D means publicly condemn, which is too hostile and unsupported. The answer is A.
